chunks.title: Job's Rebuke to Friends
chunks.reason: A continuous speech where Job asserts his equal understanding and criticizes his friends' arguments.

chunks.title: Job's Determination to Argue with God
chunks.reason: A coherent section where Job declares his intent to speak directly to God and present his case.

chunks.title: Job's Prayer for Relief
chunks.reason: A prayerful petition asking God to remove His hand and dread so Job can speak freely.
